title: Yamato Stands Against Kaido
description: On pages 0–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Luffy, King as The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.
scene: The raid enters decisive Straw Hat and alliance battles while Yamato confronts Kaido and Momonosuke struggles to become Wano’s hope.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's supposed to be at the ceremony in Alabama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...but when it comes down to it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I'd like to continue my adven- tures...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Looking good, command- er! ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We came to see Princess Viv1!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: An X would be a good symbol!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But the X originally signified a death threat.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: That's okay. An X is good!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Whatever, just draw it. We've got more important things to worry about.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But if we ever see each other again...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ... Will you call me your ship- mate?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you hear that?! The princess is in cahoots with the straw hat pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Princess belonged to that pirate gang?! No way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we give them proof that she's our friend, they'll brand her a criminal.

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War through 36 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on battle momentum, shifting alliances, and character resolve.
